steps.title: Determine the sign and magnitude
steps.content: The line of best fit slopes downward from left to right, so the slope is negative (eliminates C and D). To distinguish $-7$ from $-0.7$, estimate $\dfrac{\text{rise}}{\text{run}}$ between two clear points on the line.

steps.title: Match the slope
steps.content:
The line drops by roughly $0.7$ units of $y$ for every $1$ unit of $x$ — a shallow negative slope, not a steep one. So the slope is closest to $-0.7$.

B is correct.
